# packages corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === PyPI macaroon tokens ===
# expect: PyPI Upload Token
Token pypi-AgEIcHlwaS5vcmcAbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd here.

# expect: TestPyPI Upload Token
Token pypi-AgENdGVzdC5weXBpLm9yZAbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd here.

# === Ruby / Cargo / NuGet ===
# expect: RubyGems API Key
Key rubygems_a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4 here.

# expect: crates.io API Token
Token cioAb3xYz90Ab3xYz90Ab3xYz90Ab3xYz90 here.

# expect: NuGet API Key
Key oy2abc012abc012abc012abc012abc012abc012abc012a here.

# === JFrog Artifactory ===
# expect: JFrog Artifactory API Key
Key AKCpAbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCdEF here.

# expect: Artifactory Reference Token
Token cmVmdGtuAbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd1234AbCd here.

# === Clojars ===
# expect: Clojars Deploy Token
Token CLOJARS_a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4abcd here.

# === Packagist ===
# expect: Packagist API Token
Token packagist_uat_a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4a1b2c3d4 here.

# === Endor / Socket / Duffel (Block 3b) ===
# expect: Endor Labs Token
# expect: Socket.dev Token
# expect: Duffel Access Token

sktsec_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
